2605.20459.title: Pixel Wised Lesion Prediction on COVID-19 CT Imagery: A Comparative Analysis of Automated Image Segmentation Architectures
2605.20459.paper_summary: In recent years, there has been a notable increase in the level of attention that is given to algorithms based on deep learning in the context of medical image segmentation. Nevertheless, the reliability of the field has been hindered due to the absence of a standardized methodology for performance analysis and the utilization of different datasets in previous research. The primary objective of the research is to comprehensively evaluate contemporary segmentation frameworks combined with state-of-the-art pre-trained backbones in order to accurately predict COVID-19 lesions in CT images. Moreover, this evaluation can serve as a point of reference for the segmentation of images in various other imaging scenarios. In order to accomplish this, we integrate four distinct deep learning architectures, namely Unet, PSPNet, Linknet, and FPN, with six pre-trained encoders, including VGG 19, DenseNet 121, Inception ResNet V2, MobileNet V2, SeresNet 101, and EfficientNet B0. This approach enables the development of diverse testing architectures. In the context of image segmentation, our research encompassed both binary and multi-class experimentation. The findings derived from our analysis of three distinct COVID-19 CT segmentation datasets indicate that deep learning architectures yield precise and efficient segmentation outcomes. Significantly, a maximum F1-Score of 98% was attained for binary class segmentation, while multi-class segmentation yielded F1-Scores of 75% and 77% across two separate datasets. The utilization of artificial intelligence and deep learning enhances the diagnostic process for pandemic diseases across multiple dimensions.
2605.20459.paper_summary_zh: 近年來，在醫學影像分割的背景下，基於深度學習的算法受到的關注顯著增加。然而，由於缺乏標準化的性能分析方法以及先前研究中使用的不同數據集，該領域的可靠性受到阻礙。本研究的主要目標是全面評估當代分割框架，結合最先進的預訓練骨幹，以準確預測CT影像中的COVID-19病變。此外，這一評估可以作為各種其他影像場景中影像分割的參考點。為了實現這一目標，我們整合了四種不同的深度學習架構，即Unet、PSPNet、Linknet和FPN，與六個預訓練編碼器，包括VGG 19、DenseNet 121、Inception ResNet V2、MobileNet V2、SeresNet 101和EfficientNet B0。這種方法使得開發多樣化的測試架構成為可能。在影像分割的背景下，我們的研究涵蓋了二元和多類別的實驗。我們對三個不同的COVID-19 CT分割數據集的分析結果顯示，深度學習架構能夠產生精確且高效的分割結果。值得注意的是，二元類別分割的最大F1-Score達到98%，而多類別分割在兩個不同數據集上分別獲得了75%和77%的F1-Score。人工智慧和深度學習的應用在多個維度上提升了對流行病的診斷過程。
2605.20459.author: Sarmad Khan et.al.
2605.20459.authors: Sarmad Khan, Arslan Shaukat, Umer Asgher, Basim Azam
